SEARCH
Package com.noorlandmc.NoorItems.item

Class Item

java.lang.Object
com.noorlandmc.NoorItems.item.Item
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
Direct Known Subclasses:
DurableItem, EnchantmentScroll
public abstract class Item extends Object implements org.bukkit.event.Listener
Abstract base class for custom items.

Provides common properties and methods for all custom items, such as ID, name, material, and stack size.

Handles giving, item retrieval, and item identification, allowing subclasses to define specific behaviors and attributes.

    Creates a new Item with the given plugin, ID, material, name, flavor text, other lore, and stack size.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getId()
    Gets the unique string identifier for this item type, which is used for identifying the item in inventories and during events.
    org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack
    getItem()
    Gets the ItemStack representation of this item, including its material, name, lore, custom model data, and persistent data container for identification.
    org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack
    getItem(int amount)
    Gets the ItemStack representation of this item with the specified amount, including its material, name, lore, custom model data, and persistent data container for identification.
    String
    getMaterial()
    Gets the Bukkit Material that this item is based on, which determines the item's behavior and interactions in the game.
    void
    give(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
    Gives this item to the specified player by adding the appropriate ItemStack to their inventory.
    void
    give(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, int amount)
    Gets the ItemStack representation of this item, including its material, name, lore, custom model data, and persistent data container for identification.
    protected static net.kyori.adventure.text.Component
    gradient(String text, net.kyori.adventure.text.format.TextColor start, net.kyori.adventure.text.format.TextColor end)
    Applies a color gradient to the given text, transitioning from the specified start color to the end color across the length of the text.
    boolean
    isItem(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
    Checks if the given ItemStack is an instance of this custom item type by comparing the item's persistent data container ID with this item's ID.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • plugin

      protected final org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin
      The JavaPlugin instance for this item, used for registering events and accessing plugin resources. This is set as a final field to ensure it is initialized in the constructor and cannot be changed afterwards.

    • id

      protected final String id
      The unique string identifier for this item type. This is used for identifying the item in inventories and during events. It is set as a final field to ensure it is initialized in the constructor and cannot be changed afterwards.

    • cmd

      protected final float cmd
      The custom model data to display for this item. This is used for the item's appearance. It is set as a final field to ensure it is initialized in the constructor and cannot be changed afterwards.

    • name

      @NotNull protected final @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name
      The custom name to display for this item. This is used for the item's display name in inventories and when held. It is set as a final field to ensure it is initialized in the constructor and cannot be changed afterwards.

    • flavor

      protected final net.kyori.adventure.text.Component flavor
      The flavor text to display for this item. This is used as the first line of lore for the item, providing additional description or backstory. It is set as a final field to ensure it is initialized in the constructor and cannot be changed afterwards.

    • otherLore

      protected final List<net.kyori.adventure.text.Component> otherLore
      The other lore lines to display for this item, excluding the flavor text. This is used for additional description or attributes of the item. It is set as a final field to ensure it is initialized in the constructor and cannot be changed afterwards.

    • material

      protected final org.bukkit.Material material
      The Bukkit Material that this item is based on. This determines the item's behavior and interactions in the game. It is set as a final field to ensure it is initialized in the constructor and cannot be changed afterwards.

    • stackSize

      protected final int stackSize
      The maximum stack size for this item. This determines how many of this item can be stacked together in an inventory slot. It is set as a final field to ensure it is initialized in the constructor and cannot be changed afterwards.

  • Constructor Details

    • Item

      public Item(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, org.bukkit.Material material, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name)
      Creates a new Item with the given plugin, ID, material, and name. Flavor text, other lore, custom model data, and stack size are set to default values.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      material - The Bukkit Material that this item is based on
      name - The custom name to display for this item

    • Item

      public Item(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, org.bukkit.Material material, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, int stackSize)
      Creates a new Item with the given plugin, ID, material, name, and flavor text. Other lore, custom model data, and stack size are set to default values.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      material - The Bukkit Material that this item is based on
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      flavor - The flavor text to display for this item as the first line of lore

    • Item

      public Item(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, org.bukkit.Material material, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component flavor)
      Creates a new Item with the given plugin, ID, material, name, flavor text, and stack size. Other lore and custom model data are set to default values.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      material - The Bukkit Material that this item is based on
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      flavor - The flavor text to display for this item as the first line of lore
      stackSize - The maximum stack size for this item

    • Item

      public Item(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, org.bukkit.Material material, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component flavor, int stackSize)
      Creates a new Item with the given plugin, ID, material, name, flavor text, other lore, and stack size. Custom model data is set to a default value.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      material - The Bukkit Material that this item is based on
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      flavor - The flavor text to display for this item as the first line of lore
      stackSize - The maximum stack size for this item
      otherLore - The other lore lines to display for this item, excluding the flavor text

    • Item

      public Item(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, org.bukkit.Material material, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component flavor, List<net.kyori.adventure.text.Component> otherLore)
      Creates a new Item with the given plugin, ID, material, name, flavor text, other lore, stack size, and custom model data.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      material - The Bukkit Material that this item is based on
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      flavor - The flavor text to display for this item as the first line of lore
      otherLore - The other lore lines to display for this item, excluding the flavor text
      stackSize - The maximum stack size for this item
      cmd - The custom model data to display for this item, determining its appearance

    • Item

      public Item(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, org.bukkit.Material material, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, int stackSize, float cmd)
      Creates a new Item with the given plugin, ID, material, name, flavor text, other lore, stack size, and custom model data.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      material - The Bukkit Material that this item is based on
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      stackSize - The maximum stack size for this item
      cmd - The custom model data to display for this item, determining its appearance
      flavor - The flavor text to display for this item as the first line of lore
      otherLore - The other lore lines to display for this item, excluding the flavor text

    • Item

      public Item(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, org.bukkit.Material material, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component flavor, int stackSize, float cmd)
      Creates a new Item with the given plugin, ID, material, name, flavor text, stack size, and custom model data. Other lore is set to a default value.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      material - The Bukkit Material that this item is based on
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      flavor - The flavor text to display for this item as the first line of lore
      stackSize - The maximum stack size for this item
      cmd - The custom model data to display for this item, determining its appearance

    • Item

      public Item(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, org.bukkit.Material material, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component flavor, List<net.kyori.adventure.text.Component> otherLore, int stackSize, float cmd)
      Creates a new Item with the given plugin, ID, material, name, flavor text, other lore, stack size, and custom model data.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      material - The Bukkit Material that this item is based on
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      flavor - The flavor text to display for this item as the first line of lore
      otherLore - The other lore lines to display for this item, excluding the flavor text
      stackSize - The maximum stack size for this item
      cmd - The custom model data to display for this item, determining its appearance

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Gets the unique string identifier for this item type, which is used for identifying the item in inventories and during events.
      Returns:
      The unique string identifier for this item type

    • getMaterial

      public String getMaterial()
      Gets the Bukkit Material that this item is based on, which determines the item's behavior and interactions in the game.
      Returns:
      The Bukkit Material that this item is based on

    • isItem

      public boolean isItem(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Checks if the given ItemStack is an instance of this custom item type by comparing the item's persistent data container ID with this item's ID.
      Parameters:
      item - The ItemStack to check
      Returns:
      true if the item is an instance of this custom item type, false otherwise

    • give

      public void give(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Gives this item to the specified player by adding the appropriate ItemStack to their inventory.
      Parameters:
      player - The Player to give the item to

    • give

      public void give(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, int amount)
      Gets the ItemStack representation of this item, including its material, name, lore, custom model data, and persistent data container for identification.
      Parameters:
      player - The Player to give the item to
      amount - The amount of the item to give, which should not exceed the maximum stack size for this item type

    • getItem

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack getItem()
      Gets the ItemStack representation of this item, including its material, name, lore, custom model data, and persistent data container for identification.
      Returns:
      The ItemStack representation of this item

    • getItem

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack getItem(int amount)
      Gets the ItemStack representation of this item with the specified amount, including its material, name, lore, custom model data, and persistent data container for identification. The amount should not exceed the maximum stack size for this item type.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount of the item to get, which should not exceed the maximum stack size for this item type
      Returns:
      The ItemStack representation of this item with the specified amount

    • gradient

      protected static net.kyori.adventure.text.Component gradient(String text, net.kyori.adventure.text.format.TextColor start, net.kyori.adventure.text.format.TextColor end)
      Applies a color gradient to the given text, transitioning from the specified start color to the end color across the length of the text. Each character in the text will be colored according to its position in the gradient. This will be moved to NoorUtils in the future for use across the plugin.
      Parameters:
      text - The text to apply the gradient to
      start - The starting TextColor for the gradient, which will be applied to the first character of the text
      end - The ending TextColor for the gradient, which will be applied to the last character of the text
      Returns:
      The Component with the gradient applied
